root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_010_021000.receipt_no, vr_nsk_010_021000.receipt_date, vr_nsk_010_021000.money_type_id, vr_nsk_010_021000.money_type_name, vr_nsk_010_021000.receipt_status, vr_nsk_010_021000.entry_id, vr_nsk_010_021000.membership_no, vr_nsk_010_021000.memname, vr_nsk_010_021000.seq_no, vr_nsk_010_021000.item_type_id, vr_nsk_010_021000.description, vr_nsk_010_021000.principal_amount, vr_nsk_010_021000.interest_amount, vr_nsk_010_021000.item_amount , vr_nsk_010_021000.loan_contract_no FROM vr_nsk_010_021000 where 1=1 and vr_nsk_010_021000.receipt_date between '!receipt_date_1!' and '!receipt_date_2!' /*WHERE*/
